diagrams.title: Shared Lock vs Exclusive Lock Flow
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing how shared and exclusive locks are granted based on current lock state
diagrams.purpose: Understand lock acquisition rules and blocking conditions

diagrams.title: Readers-Writers Problem State Diagram
diagrams.description: State machine showing transitions between reader-active and writer-active states
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how multiple readers and writers interact and transition between states

diagrams.title: File Sharing Layers in OS
diagrams.description: Diagram showing the layered architecture of file sharing implementation in operating systems
elements: System call interface (open, read, write, lock)
diagrams.purpose: Understand where file sharing mechanisms fit in the OS architecture
